description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a rectangular top and three open shelves, supported by four slender legs with a gentle outward curve at the base. The sides feature a decorative crisscross lattice pattern, adding both structural support and visual interest. The front and back are open, allowing easy access to the shelves and visibility of stored items. The overall design is elegant and somewhat traditional, with subtle curves and a smooth finish. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood, with the possibility of some metal fasteners or supports hidden from view. Its proportions and style make it suitable for use as a display or storage shelf in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or building lobbies.
description: A tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and decorative lattice-patterned sides, standing on curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and the smooth, rectangular top with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the decorative crisscross lattice pattern and the curved legs at the base.
description_view_2: Back view, visually identical to the front, with open shelves and no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lattice pattern and curved legs, mirroring the other side.
